comments.author: @LMDiscoveryGlobe
comments.text: 0.045 micro sieverts per hour... Lower than a transatlantic flight! It's wild how much fear and misinformation is still out there.

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: I genuinely appreciate channels that encourage curiosity instead of chasing viral trends. Videos like this remind us how extraordinary the real world actually is.

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: Thank you — that's exactly the kind of channel we're trying to be.
